data.name: 抵抗魅魔-被魔紋侵蝕的女騎士的末路
data.detailed_description:
猜你喜欢


關於此遊戲

遊戲簡介

這是一款“美少女+自走棋+galgame”結合的遊戲。

玩家將在异世界扮演一名强大高潔的美少女聖騎士，招募夥伴，提升戰力，排兵佈陣，經營城鎮，堅守陣地，抵抗魅魔！

故事簡介

賽琳—

橫空出世的聖騎士。

在人們最絕望的時候率領著聯盟軍擊退了魔族的侵犯。

有著絕不退縮的勇氣與信念。

直到一個新的魔族首領——貝絲突然出現：“一切我想要的東西，我都要收入囊中。包括你哦，小騎士~”

當腹部那個古怪圖案緩緩浮現的時候，令人絕望的攻城倒數計時正式開始。

身為城主，是堅守信念奮力抵抗，還是選擇在欲望中沉淪？

在魔族愈來愈猛烈的攻勢下。

是出賣肉體填補被戰火掏空的金庫，還是堅守底線，克制自己的欲望？

前方是希望的曙光，還是絕望的末路？

風雨飄搖的城池中，你的抉擇引導著賽琳的方向——

遊戲看點

擁有獨特的城池經濟系統和輕度rouglike元素。

包括人類，獸人，精靈，法師，騎士，戰士，射手在內的數十種陣容搭配。

可隨意組合的數十種技能卡牌。

遊戲中有些選項會影響夥伴的去留，甚至與夥伴之間發生出乎意料的故事。

多達30張以上的精美CG，15w字以上的文字內容。

由專業的音樂團隊製作的精美背景音樂。

30個精美的角色模型和栩栩如生的角色立繪。

免費的抽卡系統。

為只想看劇情的玩家提供無雙模式。

【免費DLC「魅魔之軀」已實裝，購買遊戲本體即可暢玩！】

女騎士的身體變成了魅魔。

當她擁有了無可匹敵的權力和力量，

當她輕抬手指便能讓他人臣服裙下，

當她一句話就能讓人唯命是從，

她會做出什麼選擇？

昔日並肩作戰的夥伴，與魅魔軀體中無止盡的慾望和支配渴求，她能守住自我嗎？

是女騎士？還是魅魔女王？

《魅魔之軀》述說著墮落與支配的故事⋯⋯

人物简介

賽琳：

安娜貝爾：

安諾：

喀文：

data.supported_languages: 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 英文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: win10
  • 處理器: i5 6700F
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 750
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
  • 備註: 1080p, 16:9 recommended

data.name: Resist the succubus—The end of the female Knight
data.detailed_description:
Up coming


About the Game

Game introduction

This is a game that includes beautiful anime girls, auto chess, and gal game.

Players need to recruit companions to improve the battle force, deploy the troops to defeat the succubus, improve, govern the city, and fight against desire!

Story introduction

Celine –

A young Paladin.

When people were most desperate, she led the Army to repel the invasion of demons with courage and faith.

It was not until a new demon leader suddenly appeared ——

And she said, "I will take everything I want, including you, my little Knight..."

When the strange tattoo that is on the abdomen slowly emerged, the desperate countdown that is for besieging the city began.

As the lord of the city, will you stick to your faith to resist hard, or choose to surrender to desire?

Under the more and more fierce attack of the demons...

Sell your body to make up for the hollowed-out Treasury, or stick to the bottom line and restrain your desires?

Will you accept the succubus' "kindness" or fight it out?

Is it the dawn of hope or the end of despair?

In such a tottering city, your choices will determine Celine's fate ——

Game highlight

Unique urban economic system and slightly roguelike elements.

About 10 different genres of classes including knights, wizards, warriors, archers, orcs, elves, and humans.

There are some options in the game that will affect whether your companions stay or leave, and even the story.

More than 30 exquisite CG cutscenes.

Exquisite background music.

Lively character drawings and over 30 different kinds of units.

Free DLC, "Vessel of Succubus" is now available with the purchase of the main game!

A female knight finds herself transformed into a succubus. With unmatched power and allure at her disposal, she can now bend others to her will with a mere lift of her finger and a single word. What choices will she make with this newfound dominance?

Caught between her former comrades-in-arms and the endless desires and cravings for control that come with her succubus form, can she remain true to herself?

Knight or Succubus, which path awaits her?

"Vessel of Succubus" weaves a tale of descent into darkness and the allure of domination...

Character Introductions

Celine：

Annabel：

Anno：

Calvin：

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: win10
  • Processor: i5 6700F
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 750
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX
  • Additional Notes: 1080p, 16:9 recommended
